rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports
Ground all AGREE variables in the current AADL model or explicit declarations
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when modifying AADL models
Ensure all AGREE identifiers are grounded in the model or explicitly declared
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without proper exposure
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place component type contracts in component type annexes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
